title: mandevilla trianae
intro: Mandevilla trianae is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the rock trumpeter or the Colombian mandevilla. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mandevilla trianae include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of Mandevilla trianae often involve infusing its leaves in hot water to make a tea, which is then used to treat various ailments.
